title: Forge spec lifecycle state machine definition (archive-state-machine.yaml)
description: Declarative contract for spec lifecycle states, transitions, gates and exceptions (doc §10.7 + §12). The canonical instance lives next to this schema (archive-state-machine.yaml); scripts implement the same rules (spec-transition.sh, spec-close.sh, archive-spec.sh). 'archived' only follows 'verified', except via close (closed_without_baseline_update).

gate.description: Manifest gate that must be true (e.g. human_archive_approval)

scale_skippable.description: Chain state may be skipped when the scale does not require its phase (§10.3)
